name: Smart Cities
cardText: Blanket school zones, crossings and shared streets with awareness that needs no cameras, poles or connectivity rollout.

meta.title: Smart Cities
meta.description: Viziblezone for smart cities: protect school zones, crossings and shared streets without cameras, poles or connectivity projects.

hero.title:
City-scale safety,
zero construction
hero.lede: Every smart-city safety project starts with a budget line for infrastructure. Viziblezone starts with the phones your residents already carry.

scenario.title:
The school zone
at 7:45 AM
paragraphs: Children cross between parked cars, buses block sightlines, and drivers are mid-commute. Cameras cover fixed angles; speed bumps slow everyone all day. Neither sees the specific child about to step into the specific gap.

With Viziblezone, protected phones in the zone announce themselves to approaching vehicles directly. Drivers get an alert about the actual hidden pedestrian, at the actual moment of risk — no poles, no cameras, no control room.

items.title: No capital project
items.text: Deployment is distribution of software, not installation of hardware. Coverage follows adoption, not trenching schedules.

items.title: No surveillance
items.text: Unlike camera networks, the system is anonymous by design. It knows someone is there — never who.

items.title: Protect who matters most
items.text: Prioritize children, the elderly and mobility-impaired residents through schools, community programs and city apps.

items.title: Risk heatmaps
items.text: Aggregated, anonymized near-miss data shows the city where danger concentrates — before the accident statistics do.

deployment.title:
From one zone
to the whole city
paragraphs: Cities start with a bounded pilot — a school zone, a campus, a high-risk corridor — distributed through schools and community channels, with participating drivers or fleets receiving alerts. Results are measured in detected encounters and driver response.
bullets: Pilot zone with defined perimeter and measurable KPIs
Distribution via city apps, schools and community programs
Expansion path: municipal fleets, public transport, delivery fleets

cta.title:
Start with
one zone
cta.lede: We work with municipalities on scoped pilots with clear safety metrics.
